consensus_findings.detail: CI never runs tests/smoke-test.sh or tests/depth-guard-lint.sh. ShellCheck/bash -n scoped to bin/*.sh+install.sh only. No metaswarm-specific validation in CI pipeline.

consensus_findings.category: /tmp usage in CI and smoke test
consensus_findings.detail: ci.yml:41-43 writes /tmp/install-ci.sh. smoke-test.sh:9 uses mktemp -d (resolves to /tmp). Both fail in /tmp-restricted environments.

consensus_findings.category: Depth Guard lint — banned-model, premium pool, partial/failure not checked
consensus_findings.detail: depth-guard-lint.sh checks 0 of 4 banned models, 1 of 10 premium models, and 0 partial/failure status phrases. A commander with stripped enforcement would pass lint.

consensus_findings.category: Smoke test missing: banned-model rejection, stop/recovery, branch creation, atomic writes
consensus_findings.detail: smoke-test.sh validates existence of policy fields but does not test enforcement. No stop/recovery path, no branch creation assertion, no atomic write verification. Stub is unrealistic.
README says '6 files' but installer installs 8; stampede-demo not in install table; auto-exec of demo not documented and not skippable; PATH update is session-only with no documented profile config.
AGENTS.md omits: stop/teardown/recovery, banned-model policy, premium model pool, Agent Pulse feature, merger script in shell table. SwarmMesh not documented in either file.

conflict_notes: No conflicts between workers. wkr-047-003 and wkr-047-001 both independently identified CI missing depth-guard-lint.sh execution — corroborated. wkr-047-002 and wkr-047-003 both flagged partial/failure coverage gap — corroborated.
